meta.incident: HikariCP connection pool exhausted: pool-timeout warnings -> JDBCConnectionException stack traces -> all DB-backed inventory endpoints fail and reconcile job skips, amid recurring slow audit-log distractor

ground_truth.needle: connection is not available, request timed out
ground_truth.desc: HikariCP pool timeout before connection exhaustion

ground_truth.needle: timeout waiting for connection from pool
ground_truth.desc: Root jdbc exception: pool fully exhausted
Stack frame identifying exact repository call site
Hibernate wrapping the JDBC pool exhaustion
Scheduled reconciliation skipped due to DB unavailability
